name: Halloween Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. Take a teaspoon or so of black paste for food and stir it into any basic sugar cookie recipe. The dough will turn a rich black that's perfect for making bat cookies.
2. Make a bowl of orange Jello. When it's semi-solid, drip several drops of green food coloring onto the surface and gently stir them in. They'll swirl into dark demonic tornado clouds.
3. Add a dab of back whipped cream made by adding more of the black paste to partially whipped cream as a finishing touch.
4. Scrambled eggs feel and look much more like brains than cold spaghetti. Add a few drops of green, red, and blue food coloring as you're beating the eggs for the final product to frighten even the most hardened child.
5. A drop or two of red coloring turns grapefruit sections pale pink, making them into very convincing thumbs.
6. Drop a pint of cherry tomatoes into boiling water, blanch them for about a minute, then drain and slip off their skins. Instant bloody eyeballs.
7. Stir baking soda into vinegar to make it foam right out of the glass. You can also shake salt over a lighted jack o' lantern candle to create blue sparks.
